options.blogdescription: 営業力と人財力で、現場の成果まで設計する

steps.data:
<?php
// ホームページ設定
add_action('init', function() {
    $front_page = get_page_by_path('home');
    if ($front_page) {
        update_option('page_on_front', $front_page->ID);
        update_option('show_on_front', 'page');
    }
});

// パーマリンク設定
add_action('init', function() {
    global $wp_rewrite;
    $wp_rewrite->set_permalink_structure('/%postname%/');
    $wp_rewrite->flush_rules();
}, 99);
?>

steps.code:
<?php
// 固定ページ作成
$pages = [
    ['title' => 'ホーム', 'slug' => 'home', 'pattern' => 'sigroup-theme/hero-home'],
    ['title' => '会社概要', 'slug' => 'company', 'pattern' => 'sigroup-theme/company-info'],
    ['title' => '採用情報', 'slug' => 'recruit', 'pattern' => 'sigroup-theme/recruit-page'],
    ['title' => 'お問い合わせ', 'slug' => 'contact', 'pattern' => 'sigroup-theme/contact-page'],
    ['title' => '個人情報保護方針', 'slug' => 'privacy', 'pattern' => 'sigroup-theme/privacy-page']
];

foreach ($pages as $page_data) {
    $existing = get_page_by_path($page_data['slug']);
    if (!$existing) {
        $content = '<!-- wp:pattern {"slug":"' . $page_data['pattern'] . '"} /-->';
        wp_insert_post([
            'post_title' => $page_data['title'],
            'post_name' => $page_data['slug'],
            'post_content' => $content,
            'post_status' => 'publish',
            'post_type' => 'page'
        ]);
    }
}

// ナビゲーションメニュー作成
$menu_name = 'primary';
$menu_exists = wp_get_nav_menu_object($menu_name);

if (!$menu_exists) {
    $menu_id = wp_create_nav_menu($menu_name);

    $pages_for_menu = ['home', 'company', 'recruit', 'contact', 'privacy'];
    $position = 1;

    foreach ($pages_for_menu as $slug) {
        $page = get_page_by_path($slug);
        if ($page) {
            wp_update_nav_menu_item($menu_id, 0, [
                'menu-item-title' => $page->post_title,
                'menu-item-object' => 'page',
                'menu-item-object-id' => $page->ID,
                'menu-item-type' => 'post_type',
                'menu-item-status' => 'publish',
                'menu-item-position' => $position++
            ]);
        }
    }
}

// ホームページ設定
$front_page = get_page_by_path('home');
if ($front_page) {
    update_option('page_on_front', $front_page->ID);
    update_option('show_on_front', 'page');
}

echo '✓ 固定ページとメニューを作成しました';
?>
